title: Server-Side Template Injection
description: Rendering user-supplied content through a template engine without sanitization can lead to SSTI, allowing remote code execution (OWASP A03:2021 / CWE-94).

finding.message: Potential SSTI via user-controlled template input at '{{token}}' in {{file}} at line {{line}}.

references: Never pass user-controlled strings to template engines as template content.
Use sandboxed template environments if user templates are required (Jinja2 SandboxedEnvironment).
Separate template logic from user-provided data; use parameterized rendering.
OWASP SSTI prevention and testing guidance.
